title: Codex execution brief stays bounded and reviewable
description: Protects the Codex-facing brief contract created by the C-03 dogfood run.

cases.title: brief renders execution contract fields without hidden authority

input.task: Render a Codex execution brief from typed KRN task, context, capability, and evidence contracts.

expectedBehavior.subject: codex_execution_brief:review_contract
expectedBehavior.rationale: Codex-facing briefs must expose constraints, acceptance, review burden, rollback, selected context, exclusions, and proof limits without becoming the product brain.

protectedFailureModes.title: Codex brief hides review contract
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: The rendered brief must not omit constraints, acceptance, review burden, rollback expectation, selected context, explicit exclusions, or does-not-prove statements.
protectedFailureModes.detection: Rendered execution brief text lacks any required review contract section.

metadata.promptfooBoundary: Promptfoo is not behavior proof for this case.

metadata.sourceDogfood: C-03 Codex Brief And Execution Contract Hardening
metadata.doesNotProve: This fixture does not prove Codex follows the brief or product readiness.
